name: Crock-Pot Continental Chicken
recipeIngredient: 8 chicken breast halves, without skin and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the dried beef on the bottom of a greased crock-pot.
2. Wrap each piece of chicken with a strip of bacon, then lay them on top of the dried beef.
3. In a small bowl, blend together the sour cream and flour. Add the soup and mix thoroughly.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Cover and cook on low for 8 to 10 hours (or high for 3 to 5 hours).
6. Serve over hot noodles.
